name: Timecho
description: Enterprise Apache IoTDB distribution (TimechoDB) for industrial data management, used by State Grid, Baowu Steel.

seo.title: Timecho — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Timecho: Enterprise Apache IoTDB distribution (TimechoDB) for industrial data management, used by State Grid, Baowu Steel.

when_to_use: Enterprise Apache IoTDB (TimechoDB) for industrial data management
Energy grid and manufacturing sensor data at massive scale
High-frequency industrial time-series with enterprise SLA
Replacing PI System with open-source-based IoTDB distribution
IoT data management for State Grid and steel industry workloads

pros: Enterprise TimechoDB built on Apache IoTDB
Vendor support from core IoTDB team
cons: English tooling and docs still catching up
review.verdict: Credible pick for Chinese industrial IoT, Western manufacturers usually reach for Influx or Timescale instead.
review.best_for: Chinese heavy-industry digital transformation projects with massive sensor data
review.not_for: Western industrial shops already invested in InfluxDB or Timescale ecosystems

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
